negative_control: this skill rewrites the PR for you when you decide the author's approach is wrong
load_prompts: Review this PR — flag risks, tech debt, and test gaps.
Second opinion on this diff: am I missing a regression?
Critique the design doc for the auth-middleware swap.
Review the proposal: is the scope right? Is the risk register complete?
Look at the tests on this PR — are they covering the failure modes?
Review this PR — flag risks, test gaps, and any unrecorded or unmet task gates.
no_load_prompts: Implement the change described in this ticket.
Design the solution for the portfolio refactor.
Investigate why the import job is failing in production.
Just run the gate audit on status/plan.md and give me the numbers.
